---
title: "Jack Chen"
image: "jack.jpg"
color1: "#5A59A3"
color2: "#C66060"
angle: 130
links:
  - label: Bilibili
    url: "https://space.bilibili.com/7155706?spm_id_from=333.1007.0.0"
  - label: Instagram
    url: "https://www.instagram.com/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/JJ12117502"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:799904657@qq.com"
  - label: Alibaba
    url: "https://simaige.en.alibaba.com/productlist.html?spm=a2700.shop_cp.88.6"
output:
  postcards::onofre
---
 
菜鸟小陈，请多关照！！！
